items.title: GitLab Brings Carbon Awareness to CI/CD to Measure the Environmental Cost of Software Delivery

items.title: Presentation: Engineering AI for Creativity and Curiosity on Mobile
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Engineering AI for Creativity and Curiosity on Mobile. Bhavuk Jain discusses translating foundational AI into scalable mobile products.

items.title: Yelp Unifies ML Model Training with Training Orchestrator
items.summaryShort: Yelp Unifies ML Model Training with Training Orchestrator. Yelp has launched Training Orchestrator.

items.title: GitLab 19.2 Puts AI Agents to Work on the Security Backlog
items.summaryShort: GitLab 19.2 Puts AI Agents to Work on the Security Backlog. GitLab has released version 19.2 of its DevSecOps platform, adding agentic automation aimed at the security and review work that has piled up as AI coding tools generate more code

items.title: The Xteink X4 Pro could be the tiny e-reader of your dreams
items.summaryShort: The Xteink X4 Pro could be the tiny e-reader of your dreams. Xteink makes its pocket-sized e-reader even better with a touchscreen and front light.

items.title: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
items.summaryShort: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated. Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June

items.title: Bluecore Energy raises $10M to build portable nuclear reactors on barges
items.summaryShort: Bluecore Energy raises $10M to build portable nuclear reactors on barges. Maritime nuclear energy startup Bluecore Energy has raised $10 million in a pre-seed funding round led by Slauson & Co.
